issues.summary: 3 active build(s) have stale progress while hook heartbeats remain fresh; queued validations may stall behind build 29878602124230837 on worker vmi1156319.
issues.remediation: Inspect with `rch queue --json`; if progress remains stale, run `rch cancel 29878602124230837`. If this repeats on vmi1156319, drain it with `rch workers drain vmi1156319` before retrying validation.
